panel.quickLesson2: How would this appear in interviews?

npc.welcome:
Hi! I'm Xiao Di 🤖, your interview practice coach.

I can:
• Explain Case Study concepts (KPI, Funnel, Cohort, A/B Test...)
• Check your practice progress
• Give interview prep advice

What would you like to know?
npc.inputPlaceholder: Ask Xiao Di anything... (e.g., What is funnel analysis?)
npc.npcDesc: Xiao Di can explain analysis concepts, check progress, and give interview prep advice
npc.aiError:
Sorry, I can't connect to the AI service right now 😅

You can try asking me about specific analysis concepts (e.g., What is funnel? What is cohort?), or check your practice progress!
